steps.title: Match plural possession
steps.content: The sentence refers to Layli Long Soldier's star quilt poems, then describes the panels that belong to those poems. The possessive determiner must agree with the plural noun poems.

steps.title: Reject contractions and singular
steps.content: B means it is, C means they are, and D is a singular possessive. None works as the plural possessive determiner needed before eight panels. The answer is A.
